overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a vibrant futuristic city street into a covered alleyway where a violent confrontation unfolds between two characters, one armed with a handgun.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk past a police car and large digital advertisements toward a covered alley entrance

notable_agents.action: police officer standing beside a teal and black police car

entered.detail: teal and black futuristic police sedan parked at the curb
large purple advertisement billboard with 'SET SAIL for FLAVOR' text and beverage image
tall gray concrete building with geometric window patterns
tall digital screen displaying anime-style character advertisement
entrance to a covered walkway with blue structural beams and glass roof

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit futuristic city sidewalk with a police car parked nearby and large digital billboards displaying advertisements. The camera approaches the entrance to a covered alleyway between modern buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian alley with yellow structural beams and glass ceiling

events.description: enters covered alleyway from open street, passing under blue structural frame and construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered alleyway past red and yellow construction barriers, observing the trash-littered corridor ahead

notable_agents.action: person in teal shirt sitting on the ground against the wall

entered.detail: bright yellow structural support beams forming the alley framework
transparent glass ceiling panels with metal framework allowing partial light through
green and red automated vending machine with 'BURRITO' signage
piles of blue and clear garbage bags stacked against the wall
closed corrugated metal security shutters on storefronts

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered alleyway characterized by yellow structural beams and a glass roof. The alley contains trash bags, vending machines, and a few people sitting on the ground in the shadows cast by the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley corridor with active confrontation and neon signage

events.description: two individuals engage in a physical confrontation, one tattooed man pulls a handgun and points it at the other person
camera slows to observe the armed confrontation before carefully proceeding past the individuals

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing a violent confrontation between two people in the alley, one armed with a handgun, before carefully passing by

notable_agents.action: tattooed man holding a teal handgun, pointing it aggressively at another person
person in black hoodie raising hands defensively against the wall

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with 'CIRRUS' text and 'FEEL FREE' slogan mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera encounters an active confrontation in the alley where a tattooed man with a handgun threatens another person against the yellow structural beams beneath the 'CIRRUS' billboard. The scene is tense as the armed individual maintains their position while the camera carefully passes by the interaction.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley exit ramp approaching city street

events.description: approaching the exit of the covered alley back into the open city street with visible traffic

agents.ego_description: moving past the confrontation scene and walking toward the alley exit where the bustling city street becomes visible ahead

entered.detail: opening at the end of the alley leading back to the main city street
view of the open city street with buildings and vehicles visible through the exit

segments.scene_description: Moving past the confrontation, the camera proceeds toward the alley exit where daylight and the bustling city street become visible ahead. The yellow structural beams recede to the left as the open urban environment comes into view through the exit ramp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bright, open futuristic thoroughfare into a tense, enclosed alleyway before emerging back into the city light. It begins on a sunlit sidewalk past a parked police car and towering digital billboards, moving steadily toward the mouth of a covered passage between modern buildings. As the camera enters the alley, the environment shifts to a shadowed space defined by yellow structural beams, a glass roof, and scattered vending machines. The scene then tightens around a violent confrontation where a tattooed man with a handgun threatens another person against the beams beneath a Cirrus billboard, with the camera carefully navigating past the interaction. Finally, the camera proceeds toward the alley exit as the yellow structures recede, allowing the bustling urban environment and daylight to open up once more.
